segment_definition:
Detect instances where the Buffalo Bills defense executes a blitz or heavy pass rush against Patrick Mahomes. Focus on the tactical formation of the defensive front and Mahomes' movement patterns as the pocket collapses, including his scrambles and throwing actions under pressure.
 Please note the following: 
Identify segments where defenders cross the line of scrimmage immediately at the snap to pressure the QB. Timestamp should start slightly before the snap to capture the pre-snap defensive 'creep' or disguise. Include the full outcome of the play (sack, throw-away, or scramble).
metadata_schema: {"name": "H16", "strict": false, "schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"start_time": {"type": "number", "description": "Start timestamp in seconds"}, "end_time": {"type": "number", "description": "End timestamp in seconds"}, "play_action": {"type": "string", "description": "Blitz, Sack, Scramble, or Incomplete Pass"}}, "required": ["start_time", "end_time", "play_action"], "additionalProperties": false}}

segment_definition:
Identify all live-action offensive plays from the snap until the ball is dead. For each segment, classify the play as a 'Run' or 'Pass', determine the play result (e.g., Complete, Incomplete, First Down, Sack), and capture the game clock and down. I need these timestamps precisely aligned to the visual snap to train my automated event detection models.
 Small but important detail: 
Extract tight segments starting exactly at the center's snap and ending when the referee whistles or the ball is clearly dead. Exclude replays for this specific data set to ensure unique play counting.
metadata_schema: {"name": "H16", "strict": false, "schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"start_time": {"type": "number", "description": "Start timestamp in seconds"}, "end_time": {"type": "number", "description": "End timestamp in seconds"}, "play_action": {"type": "string", "description": "Type of play: Run, Pass, or Sack"}, "play_result": {"type": "string", "description": "The specific outcome of the play"}, "game_clock": {"type": "string", "description": "The time remaining on the game clock in MM:SS"}, "down": {"type": "integer", "description": "The current down (1-4)"}, "sports_markers": {"type": "string", "description": "Play State (Live/Dead)"}}, "required": ["start_time", "end_time", "play_action", "play_result", "game_clock", "down", "sports_markers"], "additionalProperties": false}}

segment_definition:
Filter the footage for high-leverage rushing attempts by Lamar Jackson, particularly the 4th-down conversion and his scramble touchdown. I need the full sequence from the snap to the point of tackle or score to analyze drive efficiency.
 One more thing to keep in mind: 
Extract segments starting exactly at the snap of the ball and ending when the runner is ruled down or enters the end zone. Include the replay at 33s as it provides a better angle for blocking analysis. Ensure the 'down' field is accurately captured from the broadcast graphics.
metadata_schema: {"name": "H16", "strict": false, "schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"start_time": {"type": "number", "description": "Start timestamp in seconds"}, "end_time": {"type": "number", "description": "End timestamp in seconds"}, "play_result": {"type": "string", "description": "First Down or Touchdown"}, "down": {"type": "string", "description": "The down on which the play occurred"}, "game_clock": {"type": "string", "description": "Time remaining on the clock"}}, "required": ["start_time", "end_time", "play_result", "down", "game_clock"], "additionalProperties": false}}

segment_definition:
Isolate all offensive trick plays, specifically those involving multiple laterals, pitches, or non-quarterback throwing attempts, to analyze schematic creativity and defensive pursuit angles.
 Additional note:
Identify the start of the play from the moment the first lateral or unconventional handoff occurs. Keep the segment running until the ball is dead or the flag is pulled. Include the 'pitchy pitchy woo woo' sequence as a single continuous event regardless of how many players touch the ball.
metadata_schema: {"name": "H16", "strict": false, "schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"start_time": {"type": "number", "description": "Start timestamp in seconds"}, "end_time": {"type": "number", "description": "End timestamp in seconds"}, "play_action": {"type": "string", "description": "Description of the trick play (e.g., 'Multi-lateral', 'WR Pass')"}, "team_name": {"type": "string", "description": "The team executing the trick play"}, "subject_action": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}, "description": "List of physical actions like 'Lateralling', 'Running', 'Passing'"}, "play_result": {"type": "string", "description": "The result of the unconventional sequence"}}, "required": ["start_time", "end_time", "play_action", "team_name", "subject_action", "play_result"], "additionalProperties": false}}

segment_definition:
Identify the high-tension sequence starting from Jordan Love's scramble to the sideline that resulted in a physical confrontation between teams. Extract the specific moments showing the hit, the ensuing player huddle/scuffle, and the referee's official penalty ruling to update our discipline and momentum tracking data.
 Be aware of the following: 
Capture the full arc of the conflict: the initial scramble, the hit out of bounds, the multi-player pushing match on the sideline, and the head referee's microphone announcement. Do not cut away until the 'offsetting fouls' are fully explained.
metadata_schema: {"name": "H16", "strict": false, "schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"start_time": {"type": "number", "description": "Start timestamp in seconds"}, "end_time": {"type": "number", "description": "End timestamp in seconds"}, "sports_markers": {"type": "string", "description": "Classify as Play State (Live/Dead) or VAR/Referee Review."}, "play_result": {"type": "string", "description": "The official ruling announced by the referee (e.g., Offsetting Personal Fouls)."}, "emotion": {"type": "string", "description": "The dominant emotional state of the players involved in the scrum."}, "player_name": {"type": "string", "description": "The primary player who delivered the hit."}}, "required": ["start_time", "end_time", "sports_markers", "play_result", "emotion", "player_name"], "additionalProperties": false}}

segment_definition:
Identify high-leverage defensive disruptions caused by Chris Jones, specifically focusing on pass rush wins that result in a quarterback hit, sack, or forced fumble. Extract the precise window from the snap to the ball's dead-state, noting the down, distance, and the impact on the offensive drive.
 Be aware of the following: 
Segments must start at the snap to analyze Jones's get-off and hand-fighting technique. Ensure the end time captures the immediate aftermath of the contact (e.g., recovery of a fumble or the QB hitting the turf). Exclude sideline shots of the player unless they occur within 5 seconds of the action.
metadata_schema: {"name": "H16", "strict": false, "schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"start_time": {"type": "number", "description": "Start timestamp in seconds"}, "end_time": {"type": "number", "description": "End timestamp in seconds"}, "player_name": {"type": "string", "description": "The defensive player (Chris Jones)"}, "play_result": {"type": "string", "description": "The eventual result of the play (Turnover, Incomplete)"}}, "required": ["start_time", "end_time", "player_name", "play_result"], "additionalProperties": false}}

segment_definition:
Pinpoint Zay Flowers #4 receptions that involve significant yards after catch (YAC), specifically noting his lateral agility and juke moves against Texans' defenders.
 Small but important detail: 
Locate short pass completions to Flowers where he immediately initiates a move to beat the first defender. The segment should capture the catch point and the subsequent first-down conversion. Priority should be given to the replay at [126s-143s] showing the specific ankle-breaking juke move.
metadata_schema: {"name": "H16", "strict": false, "schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"start_time": {"type": "number", "description": "Start timestamp in seconds"}, "end_time": {"type": "number", "description": "End timestamp in seconds"}, "player_name": {"type": "string", "description": "Zay Flowers"}, "play_action": {"type": "string", "description": "Pass reception and run"}, "play_result": {"type": "string", "description": "First Down, Gain of Yards"}, "subject_action": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}, "description": "Actions like 'Catching', 'Jumping', 'Sprinting', 'Juking'."}, "summary": {"type": "string", "description": "Narrative of the catch and the specific move used to evade the defender."}}, "required": ["start_time", "end_time", "player_name", "play_action", "play_result", "subject_action", "summary"], "additionalProperties": false}}

segment_definition:
Locate the explosive run play where the center pulls to the outside to act as the lead blocker. I need to evaluate the efficiency of this specific pulling scheme and the resulting yardage gain.
 Additional note:
Focus the segment on the pre-snap alignment and the immediate snap where the center (Creed Humphrey) leaves his position to lead. End the segment exactly when the runner is forced out of bounds or tackled to measure total play duration.
metadata_schema: {"name": "H16", "strict": false, "schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"start_time": {"type": "number", "description": "Start timestamp in seconds"}, "end_time": {"type": "number", "description": "End timestamp in seconds"}, "player_name": {"type": "string", "description": "The primary ball carrier"}, "play_action": {"type": "string", "description": "Specific play type"}}, "required": ["start_time", "end_time", "player_name", "play_action"], "additionalProperties": false}}

segment_definition:
Extract segments detailing the roughing the passer penalty against Baltimore's defense in the fourth quarter. I need to document the specific foul type, the athlete involved, and the referee's official announcement to integrate into our disciplinary and penalty-impact datasets.
 This is important: 
Capture the hit on Patrick Mahomes, the subsequent flag, and the referee's microphone announcement. Include the replay that shows the helmet-to-helmet contact to provide objective evidence for the penalty assessment.
metadata_schema: {"name": "H16", "strict": false, "schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"start_time": {"type": "number", "description": "Start timestamp in seconds"}, "end_time": {"type": "number", "description": "End timestamp in seconds"}, "summary": {"type": "string", "description": "Description of the late hit and the referee's ruling."}, "player_name": {"type": "string", "description": "The player penalized for the personal foul."}, "play_result": {"type": "string", "description": "Penalty type (e.g., Roughing the Passer)."}, "broadcast_content": {"type": "string", "description": "Type of production element, such as Referee Announcement or Rules Analyst Replay."}, "emotion": {"type": "string", "description": "Reaction of the head coach or the penalized player."}}, "required": ["start_time", "end_time", "summary", "player_name", "play_result", "broadcast_content", "emotion"], "additionalProperties": false}}

segment_definition:
Detect and segment every individual pass attempt during the 'Precision Passing' event for Baker Mayfield and C.J. Stroud. For each segment, capture the moment of ball release through the point of target impact or the ball leaving the frame. Map each throw to the specific point value of the target hit or missed.
 Extra consideration: 
Isolate individual throwing repetitions as discrete segments. Use the release of the ball from the hand as the start trigger and the visual confirmation of success (smoke plume/target movement) or ground contact as the end trigger. Exclude idle standing time between throws.
metadata_schema: {"name": "H16", "strict": false, "schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"start_time": {"type": "number", "description": "Timestamp in seconds when the quarterback begins his forward throwing motion."}, "end_time": {"type": "number", "description": "Timestamp in seconds when the ball strikes a target or hits the ground."}, "player_name": {"type": "string", "description": "The name of the quarterback performing the throw."}, "play_action": {"type": "string", "description": "Type of throw (e.g., 'Stationary target pass', 'Moving target pass', 'Gold ball throw')."}, "play_result": {"type": "string", "description": "Outcome of the pass: 'Hit' or 'Miss'."}}, "required": ["start_time", "end_time", "player_name", "play_action", "play_result"], "additionalProperties": false}}
